prompt: I have a standalone OA control. I need it to automatically refresh whenever the user selects a planogram in the main OA explorer. How do I wire this up?

assertions.name: overrides-onmessagereceived
assertions.description: OnMessageReceived is overridden to handle the published value

assertions.name: checks-key-equality
assertions.description: e.Key equality check guards which subscription fired — not blindly reacting to any message

assertions.name: calls-base-refresh
assertions.description: base.Refresh() called inside OnMessageReceived to reload the control
